_doc: Copy this to your region and fill in the facilities array. Only id, name, lat, lng, status and sources are required — leave anything you can't source as null. Validate with: python3 -m pipeline.validate_input <yourfile.json>
coverage_note: Describe what this dataset covers and how it was assembled.

_field_guide.name: REQUIRED. Facility name as reported.
_field_guide.status: REQUIRED. proposed | approved | construction | operational | rumored | withdrawn
_field_guide.sources: REQUIRED. At least one {label, url}. Every figure must be traceable.
_field_guide.city / county: county must match a name in your subdivisions file. Leave '' to auto-fill by location.
_field_guide.geo_precision: parcel | site | city | county — how exact the coordinates are.
_field_guide.mw_phase1 / mw_full: Capacity in MW. null if not disclosed — never estimate silently.
_field_guide.mw_estimated: true if the MW figure came from reporting rather than a filing.
_field_guide.acres / investment_usd: null if unknown. Acres convert automatically for metric regions.
_field_guide.water_mgd: Million gallons/day; converts to m³/d for metric regions.
_field_guide.water_status: known | redacted | unknown — 'redacted' shows the transparency flag.
_field_guide.utility: Serving utility. Matched against theme.json utilities.
_field_guide.iurc_docket / docket_url: Regulator case number and portal link, if any.
_field_guide.announced_year / online_year: null if unknown. A null announce date means the site shows across the whole timeline.
_field_guide.jobs: Permanent jobs if disclosed; otherwise derived from theme.json jobs.datacenter.
_field_guide.tax_note: Subsidies or abatements, with the figure's source in sources.
_field_guide.last_verified: YYYY-MM-DD you last checked the sources.

facilities.name: Example Data Center Campus
facilities.notes: 600 MW at full build. Water use redacted in the filing.
